title: Italian Millet Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Italian-inspired side dish made with millet, fragrant herbs, and polish sausage.

ingredients.name: Fragrant Herbs
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup, chopped fresh parsley and basil

instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add sliced polish sausage and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Add chopped fragrant herbs and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add millet to the skillet and stir to combine with sausage and herbs.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until millet is tender.
